articles.title: Humanity first: Heed Pope’s warning on AI misuse
articles.description: The Tribune Editorial: AI is not inherently evil, but neither is it neutral.
articles.content: POPE Leo XIV’s recent warning that artificial intelligence can fuel “polarisation, conflict, fear and violence” deserves global attention. At a time when AI is celebrated for speed, convenience and innovation, the Pope has reminded the world that tec... [1731 chars]

articles.title: I’ve been using “Ask Maps,” and it has forever changed Google Maps for me
articles.description: I started using this AI feature on Google Maps, and now I really can’t go back to the old way
articles.content: I’m a very good driver — don’t come at me, I genuinely am, and I’m proud of it. But no matter how good you are behind the wheel, Google Maps is always riding shotgun. Every single day, without fail, whenever I’m going to a new place or following a fa... [5098 chars]

articles.title: Enjoy A Free Copy Of Capcom’s PRAGMATA With MSI’s Vector 16 HX AI Gaming Laptop; 12GB RTX 5070 Ti Configuration Currently Going For $180 Off On Amazon
articles.description: MSI’s Vector 16 HX gaming laptop with an RTX 5070 Ti is a solid machine, and you’ll be thrilled to learn that you can get it and a free PRAGMATA copy for $1,620 on Amazon
articles.content: One of the likely places that you’ll find an excellent gaming laptop deal is Amazon, and with Capcom’s PRAGMATA doing the rounds and garnering excellent reviews, you’re definitely missing out on one of the most enjoyable experiences of 2026. What bet... [1955 chars]

articles.title: AI startup Cursor in talks to raise $2 billion funding round at valuation of over $50 billion
articles.description: Artificial intelligence startup Cursor in talks to raise a $2 billion fundraising round at an over $50 billion valuation, which does not include the investment.
articles.content:
Artificial intelligence startup Cursor is in talks to raise a $2 billion fundraising round at an over $50 billion valuation, which does not include the investment, a source familiar with the matter told CNBC.

articles.title: Report: NSA Taps Anthropic AI Amid War Dept Risk Warning
articles.description: The National Security Agency is using Anthropic’s AI tool despite a formal War Department supply-chain risk warning that effectively blacklisted the company, which has since sued multiple federal agencies after being cut off from military business, Axios reported Sunday.
articles.content:
The National Security Agency is using Anthropic's artificial intelligence tool despite a formal War Department supply-chain risk warning against the company, Axios reported Sunday.
Anthropic filed a lawsuit in early March against multiple federal age... [2194 chars]

articles.title: SMRT uses AI to improve rail reliability
articles.description: Discover how SMRT is enhancing public transport with AI to predict and reduce train delays, improving overall rail reliability. Read more at straitstimes.com.
articles.content:
SINGAPORE – Public transport operator SMRT is stepping up its use of artificial intelligence to raise service standards, a move that may take years but could reduce train delays and keep operating costs in check once deployed at scale.

articles.description: Millions of voter deletions in India raise concerns about AI-driven election fairness and potential disenfranchisement ahead of crucial polls. Read more at straitstimes.com.
